prestazioni: Engine: 3.0L M44/42 (100mm bore, 78.9mm stroke) with forged Mahle 944 Turbo S pistons (9.7:1 compression) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for 8,000 RPM reliability, paired with a custom Schrick 284° camshaft grind (intake/exhaust lift: 11.5mm/11.2mm) and titanium retainers from 944 Turbo Cup racing engines

Forced induction: Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA ball-bearing turbo (62mm inducer, 66mm exducer) with a custom 3.5" stainless steel equal-length tubular manifold (TIG-welded 304SS, 1.75" primaries) and a GReddy Type-S blow-off valve (set to 18psi peak boost, tapering to 14psi at redline), feeding a custom air-to-water intercooler (Garrett core, 12" x 6" x 3.5") with a Davies Craig EWP150 electric water pump

Fuel & Ignition: Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pump (340 LPH) with -8AN feed lines, Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors (1,000cc/min), and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU (full sequential injection, individual cylinder trims, and launch control), paired with an MSD Digital 6AL ignition box and NGK R7437-9 racing plugs (0.028" gap, projected tip)
estetica: Widebody conversion: Rieger Tuning 944 S2-specific widebody kit (front fenders +120mm, rear fenders +140mm) with carbon fiber overfenders (2x2 twill weave, 3K finish) and custom aluminum rivet bonding for OEM+ fitment, retaining the original pop-up headlights

Aerodynamics: Custom 944 GT3-style front splitter (3mm aluminum, 45mm overhang) with integrated canards (3D-printed PETG, 15° angle) and a 944 Turbo Cup-inspired rear diffuser (carbon fiber, 3-channel design) with a 90mm Gurney flap, all validated in a wind tunnel for -0.25 Cd at 120mph

Wheels & Stance: BBS RS-GT II 17x9.5" ET25 (front) and 17x11" ET15 (rear) with custom 5x130 hubcentric adapters (7075-T6 aluminum, 20mm thick), wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/17 front, 295/35/17 rear) on a KW Clubsport 3-way coilover suspension (8-position rebound, 12-click compression, 20mm adjustable ride height)
